metadata.description: Portable Claude Code skill repo -- core identity, workflow enhancements, and utility skills

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: PAI core infrastructure -- personas, LAWs, rules, and project templates

plugins.name: skippy
plugins.description: Development workflow enhancements -- context awareness, reconciliation, task rigor, plan boundaries, state consistency

plugins.name: add-todo
plugins.description: Scope-aware todo/idea capture - routes to project (.planning/todos/) or global (.claude_ideas/) store. Supports single items and bulk extraction.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via agent-browser MCP and browse CLI. Navigate, interact, extract data from web UIs.

plugins.name: check-todos
plugins.description: Unified todo checker - shows both project todos and global ideas in a single numbered list, then routes selection to action.

plugins.name: correct
plugins.description: Add a correction to the appropriate doc when Claude repeatedly makes the same mistake. Quick way to capture recurring rules.

plugins.name: deploy-service
plugins.description: Deploy a new service to LXC with nginx proxy and DNS setup. Automates container creation, networking, base packages, reverse proxy, and DNS.

plugins.name: excalidraw
plugins.description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from natural language using a Mermaid-based pipeline.

plugins.name: fabric
plugins.description: Process content through Fabric AI patterns (228+ available). Handles YouTube videos, URLs, and text input.

plugins.name: session-wrap
plugins.description: Wrap up a session - create session file + dated history file + briefing update, commit on current branch.

plugins.name: update-todo
plugins.description: Update any todo or idea -- add progress notes, complete, defer, or drop. Works with both project todos and global ideas.

plugins.name: vaultwarden
plugins.description: Fast credential lookup via vaultwarden-secrets MCP. One call, not three.

plugins.name: drive
plugins.description: Persistence loop with PRD-driven story tracking, acceptance criteria verification, and architect sign-off.

plugins.name: autopilot
plugins.description: Full autonomous execution from idea to working code. Multi-phase pipeline: expansion, planning, implementation, QA, validation.

plugins.name: team
plugins.description: Spawn N coordinated agents working on a shared task list using Claude Code native team tools.

plugins.name: trace
plugins.description: Agent flow visualization. Shows skill activations, agent spawns, and verification results during a session.
